title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at Capgemini India

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at Capgemini India
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Capgemini India. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Frontend Developer to strengthen our Mumbai-based team.

About Capgemini India:
Capgemini India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in AWS

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Professional development and training programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Capgemini India!
